opor.description: Purchase order header table representing vendor purchase commitments before receiving/invoicing.
opor.business_meaning: purchase pipeline, vendor commitments, ordered value, open purchase orders, overdue purchase orders
opor.embedding_text: purchase order po vendor supplier ordered value purchase pipeline open purchase orders pending purchase orders overdue delivery expected delivery order count order value

columns.docentry: internal unique id for the purchase order
columns.docnum: purchase order number shown to users
columns.docstatus: purchase order status, O for open and C for closed
columns.canceled: Y when purchase order is cancelled

por1.description: Purchase order line table representing item-level ordered quantities and prices.
por1.business_meaning: line items, item purchase quantity, pending quantity, delivery status, item-level order value
por1.embedding_text: purchase order lines po items ordered quantity pending quantity open quantity received quantity item details delivery line total item spend warehouse tax price

columns.docentry: links the line to purchase order header
columns.linestatus: line status, O for open and C for closed

opch.description: AP purchase invoice header table representing finalized vendor bills.
opch.business_meaning: actual vendor invoice liability, purchase invoice value, payable amount, balance due, paid invoice analysis
opch.embedding_text: ap invoice purchase invoice vendor bill supplier bill payable liability invoice amount paid balance due tax invoice count invoice total

columns.docentry: internal unique id for the AP invoice
columns.docnum: AP invoice number shown to users
columns.docstatus: invoice status, O for open and C for closed

pch1.description: AP purchase invoice line table representing invoiced item quantities, prices, and tax.
pch1.business_meaning: invoice line items, item-level vendor billing, invoiced quantity, invoice item spend
pch1.embedding_text: ap invoice lines purchase invoice items billed quantity invoice item value item spend price tax warehouse line total

columns.docentry: links the line to AP invoice header
columns.linestatus: line status, O for open and C for closed

orpd.description: Purchase return header table representing vendor returns and returned value.
orpd.business_meaning: purchase return, goods returned to vendor, return value, return count, vendor return analysis
orpd.embedding_text: purchase return vendor return goods return returned value return amount supplier return return count return status cancelled return

columns.docentry: internal unique id for the purchase return
columns.docnum: purchase return number shown to users
columns.docstatus: return status, O for open and C for closed

rpd1.description: Purchase return line table representing item-level returned quantities and values.
rpd1.business_meaning: returned items, item return quantity, return line value, vendor return details
rpd1.embedding_text: purchase return lines returned items returned quantity return item value item details tax warehouse base purchase document

columns.docentry: links the line to purchase return header
columns.linestatus: line status, O for open and C for closed
